message:
fix(http): remove premature trailer-size guard in chunked decoder

The total-trailer-size check against src.len() was overly aggressive
because the remaining buffer may contain pipelined request data, not
just trailers. The per-line limit in split_line_crlf already prevents
oversized individual trailer lines.

Removing the premature check prevents false HeadersTooLarge errors when
a chunked body is immediately followed by a large pipelined request in
the same TCP read buffer. Added decode_chunked_keeps_pipelined_next_
request test that validates a chunked POST followed by a GET with a 9KB
header correctly decodes both without rejecting the trailer phase.

Also fix formatting in streaming_response_chunked and
streaming_response_content_length test assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
